hero.tagline: Designing digital products that are clear, usable, and conversion-focused.
hero.description: 4 years turning research into interfaces people actually use — from Figma to production-ready React, amplified by AI tools like Claude.

about.title: A designer who ships — not just hands off.
about.body: I'm a UI/UX Designer who stays with a product past the handoff. I research the problem, design the solution in Figma, and — because I can also build in React — I make sure what ships matches the intent, pixel for pixel.
about.designerBody: I turn fuzzy problems into clear, usable interfaces — grounded in research and a consistent system.
about.engineerBody: I take designs to production myself, so what ships matches the intent — pixel for pixel.

aiTools.title: AI is part of how I work — not a gimmick.
aiTools.body: I fold AI tooling into every stage of the process to move faster without cutting corners on quality.
aiTools.claudeCodeBody: Rapid prototyping, refactors, and code review — shipping production frontends in a fraction of the time.
aiTools.claudeDesignBody: Design iteration and component generation, exploring more directions before committing.
aiTools.aiStudioBody: Synthesizing user research and shaping content strategy from raw inputs.

experience.title: Four years, hands-on the whole way.
experience.lead: A track record of designing and shipping real products — backed by a proven freelance record.

process.title: A clear path from problem to product.
process.step1Body: Understand the user, the business goal, and the constraints before drawing a single screen.
process.step2Body: Wireframe, build the design system, and prototype in Figma until the flow feels right.
process.step3Body: Take the design to production in clean, responsive, accessible frontend code.
process.step4Body: Use AI tooling throughout to iterate faster and raise the quality floor.

work.title: Work that starts with a problem.
work.lead: How I approach each project — the problem, the method, the business behind it, and the outcome.

project.protectedBody: The final visuals are protected. I can share sanitized, non-final work that shows the thinking and process — just reach out.

testimonials.title: What people say about working with me.

contact.title: Let's build something.
contact.body: Have a project in mind or a role to fill? Drop me a message and I'll get back to you.
contact.success: Thanks — your message is on its way. I'll reply soon.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email me directly.

footer.tagline: UI/UX Designer crafting clear, usable, conversion-focused products.
